# Codex Goal 入门

原文链接: [https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?\_\_biz=MzE5ODY2MDM4MQ==&mid=224748...](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzE5ODY2MDM4MQ==&mid=2247485528&idx=1&sn=de50370fb1c592a631f8a8d4e29dff23&chksm=977ec4d0e534c98e512e41b822c98a55246cac0466e53053fa7231a09f1d85ae76d4407d1442&scene=90&xtrack=1&req_id=1782205385197482&sessionid=1782205475&subscene=93&clicktime=1782206566&enterid=1782206566&flutter_pos=4&biz_enter_id=4&ranksessionid=1782205489&jumppath=20020_1782206518214,1104_1782206529137,20020_1782206531232,1104_1782206562150&jumppathdepth=4&ascene=56&devicetype=iOS26.5&version=18004b29&nettype=3G+&abtest_cookie=AAACAA==&lang=en&countrycode=CN&fontScale=115&exportkey=n_&pass_ticket=bCQZ/O7qpLKMem8aXNGujoHpZIK4LqDaPwGEw03bslKi4JPg3kSWUQLui1+FyyXg&wx_header=3)

![](attachments/d3dad23add50fb16.png)![](attachments/94b7bd660e80872f.png)![](attachments/ba222da5a42bc809.png)![](attachments/629f9100ee031060.png)![](attachments/0dcfa585d7683a85.png)![](attachments/03e2e98e0bb9bf9d.png)![](attachments/06d214ada7b25798.png)![](attachments/86dff10b42ff3a4e.png)![](attachments/d257f407bffefac3.png)

你用 AI 做复杂任务时，最累的往往不是开头那句 prompt，而是后面一直盯着它：继续、重试、检查、再改。

Codex Goal Mode 解决的就是这个问题。它让你先把“什么算做完”说清楚，再让 Codex 围绕目标和证据往前走。

这组卡片把 Goal 是什么、适合什么场景、怎么写得更稳，讲成一套更容易照着用的方法。

#Codex#GoalMode#AI工作流#AI编程#AI效率#Prompt技巧#知识卡片

#超级猛

Close
